brief: Geopolitical tensions escalate with US-Iran strikes in the Strait of Hormuz, while UK politics sees Labour challenging Farage over finances and a major Telstra outage disrupts Australia. In research, advances in AI world generation and prompt engineering highlight the growing intersection of AI and human-computer interaction.
news_summary: US and Iran trade strikes after tanker attacks in the Strait of Hormuz, threatening oil flows; Labour demands Farage explain a £5m gift amid money laundering concerns; and a Telstra outage highlights infrastructure fragility.
papers_summary: Papers introduce AlayaWorld for long-horizon video world generation and Prompt Coach for teaching prompt engineering, alongside visualization frameworks for traditional Chinese painting and weather foundation models.

todays_image.caption: Just as Lobophora sp. algae can filter murky water, Farage is being urged to "come clean" about murky financial dealings.
todays_image.title: Lobophora sp.
